nasb.text: I said to myself, “Come now, I will test you with pleasure. So enjoy yourself.” And behold, it too was futility.

esv.text: I said in my heart, “Come now, I will test you with pleasure; enjoy yourself.” But behold, this also was vanity.

cnv.text: 我自己心裡說：“來吧，我用享樂試試你，讓你看看有甚麼好處。”想不到，這也是虛空。

ccb.text: 我心里想：“来吧，不如尽情享乐，好好享受！”唉！结果这也是虚空。

csbs.text: 我对自己说：“来吧，我要用享乐试验你，让你看看有什么好处！”看哪，这也是虚空！
